calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-19-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Absolute Resolutions Investments, LLC

Judge: Murlene Randle. Clerk: R. Sahatjian. Case Recorded by FTR; all parties stipulated.

Gloria Zarco, Esq. appeared via Zoom Audio for plaintiff Absolute Resolutions Investments LLC with witness Haley Schweninger, Custodian of Records who also appeared by Zoom Audio.

No appearance by defendant Francisco Mayren

Plaintiff's complaint for Money due on Account/Open book Account was filed on 7/15/2021 and personally served on defendant Francisco Mayren on 8/18/2020 and filed on 9/30/2020

No Does named in complaint

Notice of time and place of trial was filed on 2/19/2021

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation and against the defendant Francisco Mayren, as follows:
Damages $8,858.84
Costs $321.95
Total $9180.79

Counsel for Plaintiff shall prepare the corrected proposed Order After Hearing and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-12-2021 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2021 Set For Trial On Jul-12-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
